title: Abortion
doc_html:
§20.1. Abortion

            Section 20.1. To protect human life, nothing in this constitution shall be construed to secure or protect a right to abortion or require the funding of abortion.

            Acts 2019, No. 447, §1, approved Nov. 3, 2020.
doc_text:
§20.1.  Abortion
Section 20.1.  To protect human life, nothing in this constitution shall be construed
to secure or protect a right to abortion or require the funding of abortion.
Acts 2019, No. 447, §1, approved Nov. 3, 2020.
